reviews.review_title: One Star because of no cross buy GearVR
reviews.review_description: One Star because of no cross buy GearVR

When I first launched it seemed like the game should be asking for a microphone  permission.  Without it multiplayer crashes and you cant talk to your robot like you should be able to. 

I emailed the dev and he suggested manually turning on the permission (not in Oculus... In Android Settings, Apps, Daydream Blue).  Tested/confirmed 10 second fix. 

Game is older (for VR) and uses gaze targeting but the new controller works as a touchpad.  (Forward is to the right)

Game is extemely relaxing.  It has simple minigames and crafting built in to keep you engaged but not challenged, so its great to play if youre stressed or tired.

I only just started playing this, but I like it so far. Unlike most apps in VR, this one actually feels like a virtual reality experience instead of just a smartphone app translated to a headset. I'm enjoying the environment and I look forward to exploring it more.
Are you working on multiplayer to work?????it fails do not work

In total disagreement with negative reviews. As a VR developer I think this app points the way to a calm, immersive vr experience on mobile. Meeting friends in here and playing offers a freedom to just chill and do anything you want while enjoying this heartwarming lovely world. Looking forward to updates!

reviews.review_title: Hmmmm. .......I tried to like this game
reviews.review_description: but it is a little boring.

You should really add weather!  I would love rain and thubderstorms and stuff.  And maybe a thing to select weather.  Also, you should make it so you can lock what time it is and lock the weather you want too.  That would be awesome.
This is a beautiful and relaxing world to hang in. I really enjoyed the discovery elements of the game.
Should have been 5 euro all along

I loved the idea but have no friends even when leaving my valley open all the time. The game causes my phone to over heat fairly quickly and would be a problem if I didnt have a vr front piece with fan. I would love to be able to experience this with others.

Needs multiplayer to work, need to add more things to craft, more items to obtain, sort the voice commands for oculus go to work and also add weather and a clock lock. Many people saying the same things but no action has been taken in multiple years if you look through the comments, in short this game is nowhere near finished it’s a shell of a game and that is all.. however it’s a relaxing shell and still worth the low cost - just cross your fingers tight for updates

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback. I was not aware voice commands are not working on Oculus Go?!? I will see if I can get an Oculus Go to test. As far as multiplayer is concerned, it should be working as long as permissions are set. Maybe this is a problem with Oculus Go as well? I will need to get a device and figure it out. As far as updates are concerned, I don't intend anymore game updates. The game was released in 2015 and just isn't making enough for me to afford any more updates. Again, I appreciate the feedback, just want to be frank about the state of the game.

reviews.review_description: why isn’t every in the game held with your face? It’s kinda stupid because your not getting a full experience if you can release an update where the controller holds objects and so that we have a hand that would be great. And I’m lot playing until I see an update

reviews.review_title: It has fishing. Relaxing n fun
reviews.review_description: What a great way to spend time.
